Bus Timings

Bus 300 Timings From Capital Park to Al Shamkha Makani Mall

February 27, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus 300 serves as an essential transportation artery connecting Capital Park and Al Shamkha Makani Mall, offering a crucial lifeline for residents, commuters, and visitors navigating Abu Dhabi’s urban landscape. This vital route not only ensures reliable and affordable public transit options but also enhances accessibility to key destinations within the city, catering to diverse travel needs throughout the day.

Bus Timings

This schedule offers flexibility and convenience for both commuters and travelers, ensuring reliable transportation throughout the day.

From Capital Park From Al Shamkha Makani Mall
05:01 06:01
05:41 06:41
06:21 07:21
07:01 08:01
07:41 08:41
08:21 09:21
09:01 10:01
09:41 10:41
10:21 11:21
11:01 12:01
11:41 12:41
12:21 13:21
13:01 14:01
13:41 14:41
14:21 15:21
15:01 16:01
15:41 16:41
16:21 17:21
17:01 18:01
17:41 18:41
18:21 19:21
19:01 20:01
19:41 20:41
20:21 21:21
21:01 22:01
21:41 22:42
22:21  
23:01  

Download PDF Bus 300

Bus 300 Timetable

For the full schedule, you can visit the official AD Mobility website or follow this link to access the 300 Bus Timings.

Bus Route

The Bus 300 route includes stops at the following locations:

  1. Capital Park

  2. Gold Center

  3. Mariam Bint Said Mosque

  4. Abu Dhabi Bus Station

  5. Mohamed Bin Khalifa Street

  6. Al Jazeera Sports Club

  7. Al Maqta Bus Interchange

  8. Lulu hypermarket

  9. Ahl Al Sidq Street

  10. Al Noud Street

  11. Al Ijadah Street

  12. ADNOC

  13. Al Khalidiyah Street

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Souq

  2. Sheikh Mohamed Bin Zayed Al Nahyan Mosque

  3. Abdullah Bin Salam Mosque

  4. Al Shamkhah Mall

  5. Al Hosn Secondary School

  6. Souq

  7. Civil Defence

  8. Al Shamkha Makani Mall

Also See: Dubai Bus 81: Comprehensive Guide to Route and Stops

Bus Ticket Price

Confirming the exact fare for Abu Dhabi’s 300 bus is tricky due to limited online information. Standard routes are typically AED 4, but a zone system might exist (uncertain). For the most accurate price, contact the Department of Transport (800 850) or use a Hafilat Smart Card to ensure correct payment upon boarding.

Bus Booking

While specific online booking details for Bus 300 may vary, passengers can typically access information regarding schedules, routes, and fares through Abu Dhabi’s public transportation websites or apps. Online booking options, if available, provide added convenience for planning journeys in advance.

Journey Experience

A trip on Bus 300 from Capital Park to Al Shamkha Makani Mall offers passengers a scenic and diverse journey through Abu Dhabi. Starting in the vibrant heart of the city at Capital Park, the route takes you through bustling urban areas and quieter residential zones.

As the journey progresses, passengers get a glimpse of several key landmarks and vibrant community spaces, passing by shopping areas, local markets, and educational institutions. The long journey ends at Al Shamkha Makani Mall, a popular destination for both shopping and dining.

Read More: Bus 94 in Abu Dhabi: Route Map and Key Stops

Traveling with Careem

With the Careem app, travelers can conveniently reach Al Shamkha Makani Mall, the terminal point on the Bus 300 route originating from Capital Park. This service offers a reliable option for commuters looking to navigate Abu Dhabi’s diverse landscapes with ease. The approximate fare for this journey ranges from AED 107 to 130, providing flexibility and affordability for passengers seeking efficient transportation across the city.

Bus 300 ensures efficient connectivity across Abu Dhabi, serving daily commuters and visitors exploring the city’s attractions. With routes to Al Shamkha Makani Mall and other key destinations, it offers reliable public transit throughout the day, supporting seamless travel experiences for residents and tourists alike.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: February 27, 2026.
